name: AssemblyAI
description: Speech-to-text and audio intelligence API. Transcribe audio/video, speaker diarization, sentiment analysis, entity detection, summarization, PII redaction, and LLM-powered audio understanding.

capabilities.name: files_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a local audio/video file for transcription. Returns a temporary URL accessible only by AssemblyAI.

capabilities.name: transcripts_create
capabilities.description: Submit an audio/video file for transcription. Supports speaker diarization, sentiment analysis, entity detection, summarization, and PII redaction.

capabilities.name: transcripts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a transcript by ID. Poll this endpoint until status is 'completed' or 'error'.

capabilities.name: transcripts_list
capabilities.description: List all transcripts with pagination and status filters.

capabilities.name: transcripts_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a transcript and any uploaded audio files associated with it.

capabilities.name: transcripts_sentences
capabilities.description: Get the transcript split into sentences with timestamps.

capabilities.name: transcripts_paragraphs
capabilities.description: Get the transcript split into paragraphs with timestamps.

capabilities.name: transcripts_subtitles_srt
capabilities.description: Get the transcript as SRT subtitles.

capabilities.name: transcripts_subtitles_vtt
capabilities.description: Get the transcript as VTT subtitles.

capabilities.name: transcripts_redacted_audio
capabilities.description: Get a redacted version of the audio with PII bleeped out.

capabilities.name: transcripts_word_search
capabilities.description: Search for specific words or phrases in a transcript.

capabilities.name: realtime_token_create
capabilities.description: Generate a temporary authentication token for real-time streaming transcription.

capabilities.name: lemur_task
capabilities.description: Run a custom LLM task on one or more transcripts using LeMUR.

capabilities.name: lemur_summary
capabilities.description: Generate an automatic summary of one or more transcripts using LeMUR.

capabilities.name: lemur_question_answer
capabilities.description: Ask questions about one or more transcripts using LeMUR.

capabilities.name: lemur_action_items
capabilities.description: Extract action items from one or more transcripts using LeMUR.

capabilities.name: lemur_purge
capabilities.description: Purge LeMUR request data for a specific request ID.
